task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite. There is an existing top-level collection 'AI Research' under 'My Library'.

Create a new collection named exactly 'Neural Networks' as a direct subcollection of 'AI Research' (not a sibling). Leave Zotero running so the new subcollection is saved.

verification.description: 'Neural Networks' is a subcollection of 'AI Research'
